arch: flagship-v4 (joint WM + operative planner; λ_plan curriculum)
cfg:
{
  "encoder": {
    "in_channels": 9,
    "image_size": 256,
    "patch_size": 16,
    "d_model": 768,
    "depth": 12,
    "n_heads": 12,
    "grad_checkpoint": false
  },
  "predictor": {
    "d_model": 768,
    "depth": 10,
    "n_heads": 12,
    "window": 8,
    "horizons": [
      1,
      2,
      4
    ],
    "action_dim": 3,
    "residual": true,
    "change_weighted": true
  },
  "tactical_pred": {
    "d_model": 512,
    "depth": 6,
    "n_heads": 8,
    "window": 8,
    "horizons": [
      8,
      16
    ],
    "action_dim": 3,
    "residual": true,
    "change_weighted": true
  },
  "tactical_policy": {
    "d_model": 512,
    "depth": 6,
    "n_heads": 8,
    "n_maneuvers": 5,
    "waypoint_horizons": [
      5,
      10,
      15,
      20
    ],
    "d_intent": 256,
    "cadence": 5
  },
  "strategic_policy": {
    "n_commands": 4,
    "d_cmd": 128,
    "d_model": 384,
    "depth": 4,
    "n_heads": 6,
    "d_ctx": 256,
    "n_route": 3,
    "cadence": 20
  },
  "readout": {
    "grid": 4,
    "d_readout": 128
  },
  "tactical": {
    "n_maneuvers": 9,
    "horizon": 4
  },
  "h15": {
    "enabled": true,
    "mask_prob": 0.5,
    "weight": 0.5,
    "depth": 3,
    "observed_weight": 0.1
  },
  "loss": {
    "sigreg": {
      "n_slices": 512,
      "beta": 1.0,
      "weight": 0.1,
      "free_dims": 64
    },
    "pred_weight": 1.0,
    "inv_dyn_weight": 0.5
  },
  "train": {
    "lr": 0.0003,
    "weight_decay": 0.05,
    "betas": [
      0.9,
      0.95
    ],
    "batch_size": 64,
    "accum_steps": 1,
    "save_every": 500,
    "steps": 60000,
    "warmup_steps": 2000,
    "device": "auto",
    "seed": 0,
    "log_every": 50,
    "out_dir": "experiments/dev",
    "rollout_k": 4
  },
  "v2_ego_to_planners": false,
  "v2_ego_dropout": 0.0,
  "v2_fa_dropout": 0.0,
  "v2_goal_decode": false,
  "v2_nav_dropout": 0.0,
  "v2_traj_jerk": 0.0,
  "v2_gated_intent": false,
  "v2_anchor_tactical": false,
  "v2_route_from_vision": false,
  "v2_encoder_ego_decorr": false,
  "speed_input": true,
  "v2_invdyn_gradscale": 1.0,
  "v2_labels": false
}
note_on_the_fly_labels: FlagshipV4Dataset mints v3 factorised + strategic labels PER WINDOW from full-episode poses; for a 30k run precompute them once (v4_labels.build) and index — --poses-*/--labels-* are reserved for that path and are NOT read by this on-the-fly loop yet.
